head.hi: Memorandum by the Acting Secretary of State
head.note: Addressed to the Adviser on Political Relations and the Chief of the Division of Far Eastern Affairs.

div.p: I send you herewith the papers I have just received from Mr. Oliphant.Herman Oliphant, General Counsel to the Treasury Department; papers not identified but they referred to the proposed tung oil agreement. The question came up in Cabinet meeting this afternoon and I gather that the President would like this put through without further delay. Consequently, we should be in a position to express our views with regard to this proposed contract and with regard to the other papers not later than next Monday.
